session_label: Ottoman avenue chunked deep-probe synthesis (supersedes the shallow main-context probe)
scope: Consolidation of 4 chunked Ottoman avenue subagent probes (C1 yazmalar/YEK, C2 ISAM Yordam, C3 Sufi tekke + Yusuf homonym audit, C4 Milli Kütüphane + Diyanet) launched after the original Subagent C lost its work to API overload. Chunking strategy: 4 parallel subagents with tight per-portal scope (~15-25 min, ~20-30 tool calls each) replaces the monolithic 32-min Subagent C scope.
context_note: This synthesis DEEPENS the shallow main-context Ottoman probe at data/searches/probe_2026-05-11_avenue_provincial_ottoman_sufi_maincontext.json (committed in 447dd25). Where chunk findings contradict the main-context probe, the chunk findings SUPERSEDE (chunks did direct GET-form exercise where main-context only did site-restricted Google).

supersession_table.prior_main_context_claim: yazmalar.gov.tr is CERT_WALLED_TO_WEBFETCH; site is live per Google indexing but cert chain blocks WebFetch; residual gap for Playwright cert-ignore pass
supersession_table.chunk_c1_supersedes_with: yazmalar.gov.tr is DEFINITIVELY_DEAD: nginx 404 across all probe paths after TLS bypass; ZERO Wayback snapshots 2022-2024; alt hostnames ECONNREFUSED. Cert error was the legacy server stub. NO Playwright pass will yield results. Operational catalogue is portal.yek.gov.tr (v1.0 coverage via yek-search agent already).
supersession_table.residual_gap_resolution: FALSIFIED; remove from v1.1.0 release-blocker list

supersession_table.prior_main_context_claim: ISAM site-restricted Google returns 0 Cihanşah hits; suggests no Cihanşah-related catalogue records
supersession_table.chunk_c2_supersedes_with: ISAM Yordam direct GET-form exercise returns 5+ Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu records (Değirmençay 2004 + 2021, Macit 2002, IX. Türk Tarih Kongresi 1988); all PRINTED editions/theses, ZERO manuscript witnesses. Google has a real false-negative class for Yordam (likely robots.txt / shallow crawl). Direct GET-form is the productive method.
supersession_table.methodological_finding: Site-restricted Google is INSUFFICIENT for Yordam-based Turkish institutional catalogues. Future probes must exercise URL parameters directly.

indeterminate_followup_items.reasoning: Title pattern (Tesnîm + Rahîk are Quranic / Sufi imagery) does not match either Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu or Yusuf Hakîkî Bursavi attested works; needs catalogue-level inspection. F-FOLLOWUP-CAIRO-HIDIVIYYE.

new_fp_classes_formalized.context: Compound-title-element / honorific dedications to ruling sultans/patrons in jurisprudence, logic, muamma texts
new_fp_classes_formalized.discrimination_signal: Require Qaraqoyunlu dynastic context + Persian-Turkic poetry content (v1.0 disambiguation criterion); reject honorific-only matches
Non-Hurufi local neighbor poets in mecmûʿa layout
new_fp_classes_formalized.source: Re-classification of v1.0 Konya Hacı Bektaş BY0000010729 entry

isam_call_number_disambiguation_system._purpose: ISAM's library catalogers use Dewey-like call numbers to disambiguate Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu vs Yusuf Hakîkî Baba at the institutional level; can be used as a high-confidence disambiguation signal.
isam_call_number_disambiguation_system.source: Chunk C2 ISAM Yordam direct exercise

google_false_negative_class.behavior: robots.txt or shallow-crawl pattern hides Yordam records from Google site-restricted search
google_false_negative_class.implication: Site-restricted Google sweeps return 0 hits even when direct GET-form queries return many records; Yordam GET-form exercise is the productive probe method
google_false_negative_class.affected_portals: Confirmed at katalog.isam.org.tr; suspected at other Yordam-deployed Turkish library catalogues (Konya Yusufağa, Milli Kütüphane, etc.)

v2_edition_chain_additions.content: Değirmençay 2021 Erzurum (Persian poems edition); NEW relative to v1.0 search_keys.json editions_and_studies_for_backchain (which has Değirmençay 2004 only)

v2_codicology_lead.content: Milli Kütüphane manuscript holdings paper-type metadata enumeration; useful for v2.0 codicology-augmentation work; integrates with the decorated-paper corpus project

v2_mecmua_mining_lead.content: Hurufi text in Diyanet collection; per v1.0 Nesîmî-adjacency heuristic, Hurufi co-occurrence is a Cihanşah-witness predictor; full metadata needs Playwright (detail page is JS-encoded)

summary.vs_original_subagent_c: Original Subagent C ran 32 min / 61 tool uses then API-overloaded; 4 parallel chunks ran in 15 minutes wall-clock with NO failures. Chunking reduced wall-clock by ~50% AND eliminated the single-point-of-failure overload risk.
summary.v1_register_impact: ZERO. 14-entry register unchanged. by_verification sum unchanged.
summary.ottoman_avenue_v1_1_status: EXHAUSTIVELY_PROBED; 4 chunks deepen the prior main-context shallow probe; cumulative Cihanşah probe outcome NEGATIVE across yazmalar (dead) + YEK parent + ISAM Yordam + Sufi tekke (Konya/Bursa/Hacı Bektaş/Edirne) + Milli Kütüphane + Diyanet.
